CustomField.description: If any of these fields is empty, sage will not accept it's import
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(sirenum__Payment_method__c,"Limited Company"),"", IF(LEN( sirenum__NI_Category__c )=0, "NI Category" & BR(),"") & IF(LEN(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c ) <> 8 || MID(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c, 3, 1) <> "-" || MID(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c, 6, 1) <> "-", "Sort Code " & BR(),"") & IF(LEN(TEXT(Salutation))=0 , "Salutation" & BR(),"") & IF(LEN( sirenum__Payment_Account_Name__c )=0 , "Missing Bank Account Name" & BR(),"") & IF(ISNULL( sirenum__Work_Start_Date__c ), "Work Start Date" & BR(),"") & IF(ISNULL( sirenum__Tax_Code__c ), "Tax Code" & BR(),"") & IF(LEN(TEXT( sirenum__Marital_Status__c ))=0,"Marital Status" & BR(),"") & IF(ISNULL( Birthdate), "Birthdate Missing"& BR(),"") & IF(LEN(TEXT( sirenum__Payment_method__c ))=0, "Payment Method Missing" & BR(),"")& IF(LEN(TEXT( sirenum__Payment_Frequency__c ))=0, "Payment Frequency Missing" & BR(),"")& IF(ISBLANK( sirenum__Employee_Reference__c), "Payment Record missing" & BR(),"") )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: this is a list of information missing for staff to be transfered to sage
CustomField.label: Sage Missing (Staff)
